name: Zinc
description: Zinc is an essential mineral that plays a critical role in skin health, regulating oil production, reducing inflammation, and supporting wound healing. In skincare, zinc PCA and zinc oxide are commonly used forms -- zinc PCA controls sebum and fights acne while zinc oxide provides broad-spectrum sun protection. It is especially beneficial for oily, acne-prone skin seeking mattifying and calming effects.
